title: protasparagus stipulaceus
side_effects: Protasparagus stipulaceus can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high toxicity levels. Prolonged consumption of the plant can also lead to kidney damage and liver failure, resulting in severe complications. In some cases, improper use of Protasparagus stipulaceus may cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and respiratory problems. It's essential to consult with a medical professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes to avoid any potential health risks.
